_meta.description: Known contracts. Auto-seeded from defipatriot/adao_json_storage/alliancedao_registry.json (44 entries) plus additions. Edit to add new contracts.

schema.name: display name
schema.validActions: actions safe to expect in proposals targeting this
schema.canReceiveFunds: boolean — can this address receive funds in proposals?
schema.seen_in_props: array of prop IDs where this was used and verified safe

terra1zly98gvcec54m3caxlqexce7rus6rzgplz.name: Eris LP Compounder
terra1zly98gvcec54m3caxlqexce7rus6rzgplz.description: Auto-compounds LP rewards, issues amplp receipts

terra1uqhj8agyeaz8fu6mdggfuwr3lp32jlrx5h.name: Eris TLA VP Lock (arbLUNA)
terra1uqhj8agyeaz8fu6mdggfuwr3lp32jlrx5h.description: Lock arbLUNA → NFT with VP. Max lock = 10x multiplier, 2yr unwind. VP fixed until tokens added.

terra1awq6t7jfakg9wfjn40fk3wzwmd57mvrqtt.name: Eris Asset Staking (Astro LP)
terra1awq6t7jfakg9wfjn40fk3wzwmd57mvrqtt._note_review_2026_06_02: Maps to the 'project' bucket in the TLA gauge system (per global_config.all_addresses → asset_staking__project). Current label 'Astro LP' describes which DEX's LPs stake here, but the underlying bucket name is 'project'. Consider relabeling for consistency with bucket naming used elsewhere in the catalog.

terra1qdz5qgafx88kp5mf6m2tah8742g4u5g2ce.name: Eris Asset Staking (WW LP)
terra1qdz5qgafx88kp5mf6m2tah8742g4u5g2ce._note_review_2026_06_02: Maps to the 'single' bucket in the TLA gauge system. Holds single-asset stakes (ampCAPA, xASTRO, wBTC.creda.a, etc.) plus White Whale (Skeleton Swap) LPs. Current label 'WW LP' is partially accurate but misses single-asset stakes. Consider relabeling for consistency.

terra1x8v9fujf3c78q2we23x0vgzmxgtt0hgvuv.name: TLA Connector Alliance (Primary)
terra1x8v9fujf3c78q2we23x0vgzmxgtt0hgvuv.description: Manages LP reward claims. Withdraw sends back zluna receipt token → get ampLUNA (default) or LUNA.

terra1u72y7gppxrsncctvgfyqduv3md6pgq77pq.name: TLA Connector Alliance (Secondary)
terra1u72y7gppxrsncctvgfyqduv3md6pgq77pq.description: Manages LP reward claims. Withdraw sends back zluna receipt token → get ampLUNA (default) or LUNA.

terra1hfksrhchkmsj4qdq33wkksrslnfles6y2l.name: TLA Amp Gauges (Voting)
terra1hfksrhchkmsj4qdq33wkksrslnfles6y2l.description: Vote with TLA VP across 4 gauge buckets: stable, project, bluechip, single. 100% VP per bucket.

terra1c57ur376szdv8rtes6sa9nst4k536dynun.name: AllianceDAO Voting Module
terra1c57ur376szdv8rtes6sa9nst4k536dynun.notes: aDAO's DAODAO voting module. 157 active NFT stakers as of last HAR capture. These are the canonical aDAO members (NFT holders who have staked for voting power). The DAO core is the council multi-sig at terra1yqv0af22675w...

terra1phr9fngjv7a8an4dhmhd0u0f98wazxfnzc.name: aDAO NFT Collection
terra1phr9fngjv7a8an4dhmhd0u0f98wazxfnzc.description: NFT contract + ALLY Alliance staking. Stake NFT for DAO voting. ALLY staked to validators generates rewards that back NFTs.

terra186rpfczl7l2kugdsqqedegl4es4hp624ph.name: Eris ampCAPA Vault
terra186rpfczl7l2kugdsqqedegl4es4hp624ph.description: Amplify CAPA → ampCAPA. Auto-compounds staking rewards.

terra127dehd2d6t7ynnezkxkre2w83ze0t7lmgh.name: Pixel Lions Voting Module
terra127dehd2d6t7ynnezkxkre2w83ze0t7lmgh.description: DAODAO dao-voting-cw721-staked voting module for the Pixel Lions NFT DAO. Tracks staked NFTs and voting power. Enumerable via DAODAO indexer's topStakers formula.
terra127dehd2d6t7ynnezkxkre2w83ze0t7lmgh.notes: Address verified from DAODAO indexer HAR capture (Pixel Lions members page). 291 active stakers at last check.

terra1hzh32nfvzffzapa3xk7y0uqdaxfldjhw5n.name: ROAR/LUNA OTC Escrow
terra1hzh32nfvzffzapa3xk7y0uqdaxfldjhw5n.description: OTC deal escrow for Lion DAO partnership

terra1xuqh84yz35h70p3ppt76dz5kgwwtwmsv34.name: Lion DAO ROAR Staking
terra1xuqh84yz35h70p3ppt76dz5kgwwtwmsv34.description: Stake ROAR for governance voting power

terra1zug2ur6d5ls7vgzwkh0m2002jrallfehps.name: Lion DAO Rewards Distributor
terra1zug2ur6d5ls7vgzwkh0m2002jrallfehps.description: DAODAO rewards distributor for staked ROAR

terra1hwxg6s732eparz3ys7sa4t5f64ngpd2w8s.name: Eris Global Config
terra1hwxg6s732eparz3ys7sa4t5f64ngpd2w8s.notes: Eris's root config contract. Holds the address book for the entire Eris stack (asset_gauge, voting_escrow, asset_compounder, bribe_manager, all four asset_staking buckets). The tla-registry cron queries {all_addresses: {}} on this contract as Q1 of every run to discover every other contract address it needs. If this returns null, the whole catalog run aborts.

terra14mmvqn0kthw6sre75vku263lafn5655mkj.name: Eris Asset Staking — Bluechip Bucket
terra14mmvqn0kthw6sre75vku263lafn5655mkj.notes: Holds the per-LP whitelist + take-rate metadata for the 'bluechip' bucket of TLA (LUNA pairs with major chain assets like ATOM, INJ, wBTC variants, wstETH, etc.). Query {whitelisted_asset_details: {}} returns active, below-threshold, AND dewhitelisted LPs with their take-rate state.

terra1v399cx9drllm70wxfsgvfe694tdsd9x96p.name: Eris Asset Staking — Stable Bucket
terra1v399cx9drllm70wxfsgvfe694tdsd9x96p.notes: Holds the per-LP whitelist + take-rate metadata for the 'stable' bucket of TLA (stablecoin pairs: USDC-USDt, LUNA-USDC, LUNA-EURe, USDC-EURe). Query {whitelisted_asset_details: {}}.

terra13aae4futz6jk7hmdv0gwm2xs6p4nxv4xwz.name: Votion arbLUNA-MAX
terra13aae4futz6jk7hmdv0gwm2xs6p4nxv4xwz.description: Votion vote-aggregator vault (code_id 3677). Users deposit arbLUNA, receive a factory vToken share; vault pools into one permanent veLUNA max-lock, auto-chases bribes, auto-compounds. Biggest single TLA lock holder. Holds lock_id 748.

terra1v7aw9eartqrjrhwd6c7hkmlkspcy5q4tvc.name: Votion ampLUNA-MAX
terra1v7aw9eartqrjrhwd6c7hkmlkspcy5q4tvc.description: Votion vote-aggregator vault (code_id 3677). ampLUNA / permanent max-lock strategy. Second-largest TLA lock holder.

terra1nmnrcrvsxkrcylzmkn55ghjr3xe8z58x3n.name: Polytone Proxy (ROAR/WHALE IBC bridge)
terra1nmnrcrvsxkrcylzmkn55ghjr3xe8z58x3n.description: Polytone IBC proxy bridging ROAR/WHALE to/from osmosis-1. NOT a TLA participant — was mistaken for a whale lock-holder. Exclude from TLA holder/VP counts.
